title: ETS reform must reflect reality or risk industrial decline [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The EU ETS reform must align with industrial realities, ensuring decarbonisation without driving aluminium production abroad. The current framework raises costs without enabling abatement, underscoring the need to recalibrate carbon pricing, benchmarks and carbon leakage protection to protect competitiveness.
